title: The Everlasting Man
author: G. K. Chesterton
tradition_notes: Written in 1925 after Chesterton's 1922 conversion to Roman Catholicism. The work argues the unique historical case for Christianity and Christ against secular and comparative-religion accounts.
source_edition: Standard Ebooks edition (CC0 editorial work, public domain text)
notes: Two parts (On the Creature Called Man; On the Man Called Christ), each with chapters. Includes introduction, conclusion, and two appendices.
